title: PID 1, Signals, Shutdown, Health, Restart, and Resource Constraints · Spiral Delivery Review
summary: An operations reviewer reconstructs pid 1, signals, shutdown, health, restart, and resource constraints from delayed evidence, challenges one retained misconception, and extends the bounded process lifecycle and health policy under a changed constraint. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for bounded process lifecycle and health policy after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Trace PID 1 signal handling, child reaping, shell wrappers, init helpers, stop signals, and grace periods.
Design readiness removal, graceful shutdown, deadlines, forced termination, exit codes, and durable-work recovery.
Create bounded healthchecks with start period, interval, timeout, retries, useful output, and a scope distinct from restart or dependency readiness.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# docker-basics cumulative container delivery portfolio
# Browser labs perform deterministic manifest and evidence review only.
# They never connect to a Docker daemon, mount a socket, or execute learner commands.
workspace: docker
version-baseline:
  engine: 29.6.1
  compose: 5.3.1
  buildx: 0.35.0
  buildkit: 0.31.1
  dockerfile-frontend: 1.25
transfer-boundary: authorized-disposable-environment
evidence:

steps.title: Separate evidence from confidence · Review Docker Cpu Memory Pids Limits
steps.instruction:
review case — A review queue worker ignores SIGTERM, leaves child processes, reports healthy while stalled, restarts forever, and consumes 640 MiB. Bound PID 1, health, shutdown, restart, and resources. Competency probe: Set and verify CPU, memory, swap, PID, file, and device constraints and diagnose throttling, OOM, or unsupported host behavior.

Inspect the Docker Cpu Memory Pids Limits trace for this review case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?

Evidence target: Separate evidence from confidence · Review Docker Cpu Memory Pids Limits.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for set and verify cpu, memory, swap, pid, file, and device constraints and diagnose throttling, oom, or unsupported host behavior. For Separate evidence from confidence · Review Docker Cpu Memory Pids Limits, keep Docker Cpu Memory Pids Limits connected to mechanically reviewable Docker artifact and transfer evidence.

Bound PID 1, health, shutdown, restart, and resources. Competency probe: Set and verify CPU, memory, swap, PID, file, and device constraints and diagnose throttling, OOM, or unsupported host behavior.

For Separate evidence from confidence · Review Docker Cpu Memory Pids Limits, challenge the documented misconception with manifest, inspect, lifecycle, failure, repair, and transfer evidence: Containers receive safe CPU and memory limits by default.
